SPESTG-1054 Run infra deployment stages sequentially

This PR updates the base environment deployment pipeline so infra stages run sequentially instead of in parallel.

Change:
- Dev depends on Build
- Test depends on Dev
- UAT depends on Test
- Prod depends on UAT

Purpose:
Ensure each environment completes before the next environment starts, based on the requested deployment flow.


Vishal Kumar, I created the follow-up PR for the infra pipeline sequencing.

This updates the base environment deployment pipeline so the stages run sequentially instead of in parallel:

Build to Dev to Test to UAT to Prod

This is separate from the Function App code deployment PR.
